creator: vidar@karlsen.tech
text:
Thanks for the report. I'm not able to reproduce it on my end on a Ryzen 7 5800X, but it's interesting that it fails on the AuraUSBController. Could you try commenting out or removing the inclusion lines referring to that controller in the OpenRGB.pro file and rebuild?
These should be lines 81, 242-263 and 671-691.
Do you have an Asus Aura USB controller?
